panel.title: Apply for BebraLand
panel.description: Click the button below and answer the questions. Staff will review your application soon.

questions.question: Why do you want to join?
questions.placeholder: Tell us what you want to do on BebraLand.

questions.question: Tell us about yourself
questions.placeholder: Age, language, playstyle, past server experience, etc.

questions.question: Rules confirmation
questions.placeholder: Confirm that you read and agree to follow the rules.
